inputs.label: Initial Investment Cost
inputs.businessContext: The upfront cost of the project or investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upfront cost of the project or investment.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die anfänglichen Kosten des Projekts oder der Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût initial du projet ou de l'investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: El coste inicial del proyecto o inversión.

inputs.label: Annual Benefits
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual cash inflows from the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual cash inflows from the project.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Zahlungseingänge aus dem Projekt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrées de trésorerie annuelles attendues du projet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Flujos de caja anuales esperados del proyecto.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Costs
inputs.businessContext: Annual costs to operate and maintain the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual costs to operate and maintain the project.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kosten für Betrieb und Wartung des Projekts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts annuels d'exploitation et de maintenance du projet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes anuales de operación y mantenimiento del proyecto.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: The rate used to discount future cash flows to present value, reflecting opportunity cost of capital.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate used to discount future cash flows to present value, reflecting opportunity cost of capital.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını bugünkü değere indirgemek için kullanılan oran; sermayenin fırsat maliyetini yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der zur Diskontierung zukünftiger Zahlungsströme auf den Barwert verwendete Satz, der die Opportunitätskosten des Kapitals widerspiegelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux utilisé pour actualiser les flux de trésorerie futurs à la valeur actuelle, reflétant le coût d'opportunité du capital.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa utilizada para descontar flujos de caja futuros a valor presente, reflejando el coste de oportunidad del capital.

inputs.label: Project Lifetime
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the project is expected to generate benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the project is expected to generate benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projenin fayda sağlamasının beklendiği yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, in denen das Projekt voraussichtlich Vorteile generiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles le projet devrait générer des bénéfices.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que se espera que el proyecto genere beneficios.

inputs.label: Salvage Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of the investment at the end of its life.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of the investment at the end of its life.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert der Investition am Ende ihrer Laufzeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de l'investissement à la fin de sa durée de vie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de la inversión al final de su vida útil.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
